archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) mixed with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy). Atmosphere of a dim Milano wine bar.
vibe: Warm, amber, burnt orange, espresso/charcoal background, soft glows, terracotta. Authentic, Italian, informal.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E85D04] hover:bg-[#DC2F02] text-[#FDF0D5] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(232,93,4,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(220,47,2,0.5)] hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#3A302A] hover:border-[#F4A261] text-[#FDF0D5] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:text-[#F4A261]

cards.base: bg-[#1A1513] border border-[#3A302A] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#E85D04]/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.base: bg-[#0D0B0A] border border-[#3A302A] text-[#FDF0D5] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#E85D04] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E85D04] transition-all placeholder:text-[#B0A89F]

landing.hero: Dark overlay on hero background image (bg-black/50 to bg-black/70 gradient). Huge bold headline 'Trova la compagnia giusta per un aperitivo'. Single line subtitle explaining the concept. Signup form for Email and City. Prominent 'Facciamo Ape?' logo.
landing.how_it_works: 3 steps laid out in an asymmetrical grid. Steps: 1. Esplora i profili vicini, 2. Scrivi direttamente, 3. Decidete dove andare. Use large numeric typography.

app_core.explore: Bento-style or vertical scrolling cards (Mobile first!). Card contains: Photo, Name, Age, Distance & Zone, Time slot preference (e.g., 18-19), 'Il tuo ordine al bar' (icon/text), Short bio, Number of aperitivos done. NO swiping UI, just scroll and click to message.
app_core.chat: 1-to-1 chat interface. UI reflects gating rule: First message shown freely. Input disabled/locked state until the other person accepts. Group chat features when users are added.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure ALL interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='signup-submit-btn').
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layouts to achieve asymmetrical/bento designs. Use Shadcn UI primitives internally for complex logic like Forms and Modals.
No dating app terminology or UI patterns like 'swipe right/left'. Keep it about casual drinks (Aperitivo).
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Load from Google Fonts or equivalent CDN.
Implement a Mobile-first design for the app sections, ensuring it looks like a native mobile app on small screens.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use the provided espresso background (#0D0B0A) and off-white text (#FDF0D5).
Inject 'Aperol glow' via subtle box-shadows or radial gradients behind key elements (e.g. bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,rgba(232,93,4,0.15),transparent_50%)]).
